title: Tick Control Longwood, Bronx | $125-$325
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Longwood, Bronx starting at $125. Protect your family from Lyme disease with expert tick extermination. Same-day service available!
intro: Longwood residents deserve safe outdoor spaces free from dangerous ticks. Our professional tick control services protect families and pets in this vibrant Bronx neighborhood from tick-borne illnesses like Lyme disease. We provide comprehensive tick treatment for yards, gardens, and community spaces throughout Longwood.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC specializes in Longwood's unique environmental conditions, from Southern Boulevard to the green spaces near St. Mary's Park. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved treatments and understand the tick activity patterns specific to the Bronx, ensuring your property stays protected year-round.
localContext: Longwood's proximity to St. Mary's Park, Barretto Point Park, and the many residential courtyards creates ideal habitats for deer ticks and dog ticks. The neighborhood's mix of pre-war apartment buildings with shared yards and traditional housing stock requires specialized tick prevention strategies tailored to urban outdoor spaces.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Longwood?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in Longwood range from $125 to $325 depending on property size and infestation severity. We offer free inspections and customized treatment plans for residential properties, apartment courtyards, and multi-family buildings throughout the neighborhood.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Longwood, Bronx?
faqs.answer: Ticks are active in Longwood from April through November, with peak activity in May through August. However, during mild winters, ticks can remain active year-round. We recommend preventive treatments starting in early spring and follow-up applications throughout the season for maximum protection.

faqs.question: Are tick treatments safe for children and pets in Longwood?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved tick control products that are safe for children and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. Treated areas are typically safe for re-entry within 2-4 hours after application. We provide specific safety instructions for families and work around your schedule to minimize disruption.

faqs.question: Do you treat common areas in Longwood apartment buildings?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We frequently service shared courtyards, gardens, and green spaces at apartment complexes throughout Longwood. We work with property managers and residents to schedule treatments during convenient times and can provide documentation for building management as needed.
